name: Workspace Aside
description: Three-column layout for collaborative editing with page tree navigation, document editor body, and comment/activity sidebar. Used by document-editor archetype for real-time collaboration.

nav.item_content: Page icon (emoji) + page title (truncated). Collapsed: icon only.

header.right_content: Share button + collaborator avatars (stacked, max 4 + overflow count) + notifications + user avatar
header.button_sizing: Buttons in the header use compact sizing: py-1.5 px-3 text-sm (~32px tall). The header is a tight 52px bar — default d-interactive padding is too large here.

body.note: Document editor area. Scrollable. Editor mode enabled.

aside.note: Right comment/activity sidebar. Toggleable. When collapsed, shows a floating message-square icon button to reopen.
